zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes FitzWarin於1387年出生在英國戴文可姆 馬丁時，她的父親Sir Fulk FitzWarin25歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Cogan13歲。她於大約1408年與Sir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourt在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1433年12月1日在英國戴文享年46歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes FitzWarin于1387年出生在英国戴文可姆 馬丁时，她的父亲Sir Fulk FitzWarin25岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Cogan13岁。她于大约1408年与Sir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourt在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1433年12月1日在英国戴文享年46岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes FitzWarin was born in 1387, in Combe Martin, Devon, England, her father, Sir Fulk FitzWarin, was 25 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Cogan, was 13. She married Sir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourt about 1408, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 1 December 1433, in Devon, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes FitzWarin est née en 1387, à Combe Martin, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Fulk FitzWarin, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Cogan, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourt environ 1408, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 décembre 1433, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes FitzWarin 1387 in Combe Martin, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Fulk FitzWarin 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Cogan 13. Sie hat um 1408 in Devon, England Sir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Dezember 1433 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Devon, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes FitzWarin è nata il nel 1387 nel Combe Martin, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Fulk FitzWarin, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Cogan, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourt circa 1408, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 dicembre 1433, nel Devon, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes FitzWarinが1387年にイギリスデボンコンベ マルティンで生まれた時，父Sir Fulk FitzWarinは25歳，母Lady Elizabeth Coganは13歳であった。約1408年にイギリスデボンでSir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1433年12月1日にイギリスデボンで46歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes FitzWarin(이)가 1387년 영국 데폰 코브 마틴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Fulk FitzWarin(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Cogan(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1408년 영국 데폰에서 Sir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1433년 12월 1일 영국 데폰에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Heleigh Castle, Audley, Staffordshire, E: Audley, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes FitzWarin nasceu em 1387, em Combe Martin, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Fulk FitzWarin, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Cogan, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourt aproximadamente 1408, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1433, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes FitzWarin родилась в 1387 г. в местности комб мартинь, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Fulk FitzWarin было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Cogan, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourt около 1408 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 декабря 1433 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes FitzWarin nació en 1387, en Combe Martin, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Fulk FitzWarin, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Cogan, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Sir John Cole I, Knight of Agincourt aproximadamente 1408, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de diciembre de 1433, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
